name: @ai-native-methodology/codegraph-runner
description: CodeGraph OSS (@colbymchenry/codegraph) 실제 실행 runner — analysis 단계 필수 도구 (Semgrep 동급 / R19 Tier 1 in-env / no-simulation). codegraph index + status --json → code-graph.json (code↔code 구조 reference-lens 산출물 / NOT gate-injected / DEC-2026-05-30-codegraph-essential). 7-field evidence + evidence_trust=real_tool / 환경 부재 시 exit 3 정직 신호.
